pi_items.source: setup_task.sh volume creation and export_result.sh variable assignment
Directly running the exact file generation snippet from setup_task.sh using bash and computing md5sum

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates on a synthetically generated VeraCrypt volume created by setup_task.sh. Verified that the explicit password ('Journalist2024!'), volume path, target file, and recovery paths explicitly match the task description instructions and export scripts. Discovered a critical defect: the expected file content MD5 hash in the task metadata and verifier logic ('e5828c564f71fea3a12dac8c643933f8') explicitly contradicts the true MD5 hash of the synthetically generated file ('cea55e50b912d2f19899dcdac2715bc0'), making the task's 40-point content check programmatically unscorable as it will perpetually fail valid agent implementations.
